page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Dalton Project is a Python platform for molecular- and electronic-structure simulations of complex systems. The Dalton Project provides a uniform platform access to the underlying Dalton and LSDalton software. The platform is designed as to host additional future software libraries and program modules.
